title: coleus adenophorus
intro: Coleus adenophorus is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coleus adenophorus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
